question: Which store needs restocking the most?
generated_sql: SELECT s.store_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_sold, SUM(st.quantity) AS total_in_stock, SUM(st.quantity) - SUM(oi.quantity) AS restock_needed FROM stores s JOIN orders o ON s.store_id = o.store_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN stocks st ON s.store_id = st.store_id AND oi.product_id = st.product_id GROUP BY s.store_id, s.store_name ORDER BY restock_needed DESC LIMIT 1

graph_state.finalSql: SELECT s.store_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_sold, SUM(st.quantity) AS total_in_stock, SUM(st.quantity) - SUM(oi.quantity) AS restock_needed FROM stores s JOIN orders o ON s.store_id = o.store_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN stocks st ON s.store_id = st.store_id AND oi.product_id = st.product_id GROUP BY s.store_id, s.store_name ORDER BY restock_needed DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me sales data for the Baldwin store
generated_sql: SELECT s.store_name, o.order_date, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, oi.list_price, oi.discount FROM stores s JOIN orders o ON s.store_id = o.store_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE s.store_name = 'Baldwin Bikes' ORDER BY o.order_date DESC

graph_state.finalSql: SELECT s.store_name, o.order_date, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, oi.list_price, oi.discount FROM stores s JOIN orders o ON s.store_id = o.store_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE s.store_name = 'Baldwin Bikes' ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
